title: myrsine ireneae subsp. ireneae
intro: Myrsine ireneae subsp. ireneae, commonly known as Irene's myrsine, is a plant species native to the island of Kauai in Hawaii. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Irene's myrsine include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties that can help to protect against cell damage. Irene's myrsine can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
